name: ARIAPatientGenderIdentity
title: Patient Gender Identity
description:
This value set includes supported gender identity configured in aria. 
The list of configured gender identity are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-genderidentity'. 
All values can be accessed using  $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-genderIdentity
